title: Empty lichen_l2_ctx struct serves no purpose
description:
lichen_l2.c:268-270 defines struct lichen_l2_ctx as empty with comment 'all state is static in this module', then line 273 defines NET_L2_GET_CTX_TYPE_LICHEN_L2 to use it.

What goes wrong as-is: The empty struct exists solely to satisfy NET_DEVICE_INIT's requirements. A reader unfamiliar with Zephyr's net_if internals may wonder why it exists.

Suggestion: Add a brief comment explaining this is a Zephyr API requirement, not a design choice. Something like: '/* Required by NET_DEVICE_INIT macro; unused because LICHEN state is static */'.
close_reason: By design: empty struct required by Zephyr NET_DEVICE_INIT API
